goal: Deprecate gad startup in favor of gad snapshot --create-session. First call of the day auto-creates a session record if none exists. Keep startup as a documented alias for one release, then remove. Decision 2026-04-20 D6.
resolution: Close-out sweep: gad startup is now documented as an alias for gad snapshot per decision 2026-04-20 D6. Help text on installed gad 1.35.0: 'Print the GAD session-start contract. Prefer gad snapshot --projectid <id> — snapshot is the canonical orientation command. startup remains as an alias.' Deprecation complete.
